archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast (Archetype 4) infused with Clean Intelligence

core_principles: Liquid Glass Foundation: Use soft translucency and layered depth, not flat blur. Apply 'glassmorphism' selectively to floating controls and active panels, anchored by stark white solid surfaces.
Stark & Organized: As a cleaning app, the UI must feel deeply organized, decluttered, and premium. Generous negative space.
Intelligence over Decoration: Do not use decorative gradients. Use stark contrasts and precise typography to convey 'AI efficiency'.
Native Gestures: Embrace HIG paradigms—swipeable cards for photo cleaning, bottom tab navigation, spring-based micro-interactions.

colors.description: A crisp, trustworthy palette signifying digital hygiene and AI precision.

buttons.primary: Pill-shaped (borderRadius: 9999), bg: primary (#005BB5), text: White, font-weight: 700. Provide scale-down animation on press.
buttons.secondary: Pill-shaped, bg: surface_secondary (#F1F5F9), text: text_primary, font-weight: 600.
buttons.destructive: Pill-shaped, bg: destructive_light, text: destructive, font-weight: 700.

cards.standard: bg: #FFFFFF, borderRadius: 24, shadow: soft_card, border: 1px solid #F1F5F9. Used for dashboard summary metrics.
cards.swipeable_photo: Large vertical card (approx 80% screen height) for photo review. Image covers top 80%, bottom 20% contains meta info and keep/delete floating buttons.
cards.smart_album: Square grid items (2 columns), borderRadius: 16. Image overlay bg: rgba(0,0,0,0.3) for text legibility. Label positioned bottom-left.

navigation.bottom_tab: BlurView background (glassmorphism: absolute fill, tint: light, intensity: 80). Active icon color: primary, Inactive: text_tertiary.
navigation.header: Large iOS native style header. Transparent background scrolling into a blurred sticky header. Use standard safe area insets.

onboarding.title: Spot Duplicates Instantly
onboarding.subtitle: Our AI identifies exact copies and visually similar photos, helping you reclaim gigabytes of space.

onboarding.title: Smart Photo Organization
onboarding.subtitle: Automatically group your gallery into receipts, selfies, food, and more. Keep what matters.

onboarding.title: Declutter Your Inbox
onboarding.subtitle: Connect Gmail to securely find and bulk-delete spam, promotions, and useless old threads.

screens.dashboard_home: Overview of 'Storage Saved'. Large circular progress/donut chart indicating cleanable space. Quick action cards: 'Clean Photos', 'Organize Albums', 'Clean Inbox'.
screens.photo_cleaner: Tinder-style swipeable card deck or vertical scroll feed. Each card shows a duplicate set. Actions: 'Keep Best & Delete Rest', 'Keep All'. Smooth animations on action.
screens.smart_albums: 2-column grid of AI-categorized albums (Screenshots, Documents, Pets, Food). Clicking an album shows a masonry or 3-column grid of photos.
screens.email_cleaner: List view of emails grouped by 'Newsletters', 'Promotions', 'Spam'. Swipe-to-delete row interactions. 'Select All' floating action button.
screens.settings: Standard iOS grouped list. 'Connected Accounts' (Gmail OAuth toggle). Storage permissions toggle.
